name: turjuman
description: Open-source, self-hosted translation management platform managed primarily through an MCP server connected to an LLM/agent.

scripts.dev:mcp: PORT=3000 tsx watch --env-file-if-exists=.env --tsconfig tsconfig.dev.json scripts/dev-serve.ts packages/mcp-server/src/handler.ts
scripts.dev:api: PORT=4000 tsx watch --env-file-if-exists=.env --tsconfig tsconfig.dev.json scripts/dev-serve.ts packages/api/src/handler.ts
scripts.test:integration: AWS_ENDPOINT_URL_DYNAMODB=http://localhost:4566 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test TURJUMAN_TABLE=TurjumanIntegration npm run test -w @turjuman/core -w @turjuman/api
scripts.stack:up: docker compose up -d localstack && node scripts/wait-for-localstack.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run e2e:up && npm run e2e:deploy && npm run e2e:test; code=$?; npm run e2e:down; exit $code
